jsonLd.title: Tanishq is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
